billing page renders generic plan and up.expected: Billing Settings renders plan, storage, and upgrade surfaces without exposing AI Boost purchase copy.

settings tab navigation reaches billing.expected: Settings tab navigation reaches API Keys and Billing on web, with active tab and URL matching the selected surface.

API keys page masks existing keys and ex.expected: Web API Keys masks raw existing keys, exposes Create API Key, validates description before enabling submit, and cancels without creating a key.

all-ui.description: Broad UI suite. Run only after focused lanes are stable.

native-health.description: Native controller health smoke through the native-ctl QA adapter.

act-026-reader-failures.description: Grouped ACT-026 reader failures 3-7 targeted validation.

reader-route-matrix.description: Reader route and deep-link matrix from baseline section 4.2.
reader-route-matrix.defaultExpectedOutcome: Reader route behavior should match baseline section 4.2 route/deep-link matrix on web Chromium.

opens query-style reader URL with one bo.expected: `/reader?ids=<bookHash>` opens one readable book, renders ReaderContent, one reader grid cell, and the inline question bar.

opens path-style reader URL with one boo.expected: `/reader/<bookHash>` opens one readable book, renders ReaderContent, one reader grid cell, and the inline question bar.

preserves optional query params on path-.expected: `/reader/<bookHash>?<queryParams>` preserves supported query params while still loading the target book.

opens encoded query multi-book URL and p.expected: Encoded query `%2B` and path `+` multi-book URLs both load two separate reader grid cells without corrupting state.

opens duplicate encoded query IDs as sep.expected: Duplicate encoded query IDs load as two separate reader cells while preserving the primary-book model.

documents current no-id reader route wat.expected: Baseline watch item: `/reader` with no ids should eventually show a recoverable empty state or Library fallback.
documents current no-id reader route wat.current: Current web Chromium behavior still renders no ready reader content for `/reader` with no ids; watch item remains open.

reader-annotations-selection.description: Initial Reader annotations/selection target; expand into deeper dictionary/Wikipedia/translate/proofread coverage next.
